hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null); LABEL=$([ -n "$FILE" ] && basename "$FILE" || echo "files"); EXT="${FILE##*.}"; if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then case "$EXT" in ts|tsx|js|jsx|mts|mjs|cjs|json|css|html) LOCAL_PRETTIER="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/apps/web/node_modules/.bin/prettier"; if [ -f "$LOCAL_PRETTIER" ]; then "$LOCAL_PRETTIER" --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1; then prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi ;; py) LOCAL_RUFF="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/apps/server/.venv/bin/ruff"; if [ -f "$LOCAL_RUFF" ]; then "$LOCAL_RUFF" format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; elif command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi ;; esac; fi; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "chore: auto-save $LABEL ($(date +%H:%M:%S))"'
